question: My part payment not reflecting in loan statement even after 2 days
answer: It takes up 24 to 48 working hours for the amount to get adjusted against Flexi Loan and takes around 3-5 days to get reversed in their bank account. Post the specified time, user can visit document center to download and view your loan statement of account also known as SOA. Part payment made more than 48 working hours ago is not reflecting or not adjusted in loan account or statement then direct user to Raise a request page where you can raise a request. CTA Label: Raise a Request, Android CTA link: bajajsuperapp://helpsupport/raisedrequest, IOS CTA link: bajajsuperapp://helpsupport/raisedrequest, Web CTA link:https://bajajfinserv.in/myaccountlogin?Source=RAR

question: I want refund of Late emi payment charges (Bounce charges)
answer: As per our internal policy, bounce charges are non-refundable. We recommend clearing your dues promptly to prevent any impact on your CIBIL score. Please ensure sufficient funds are maintained in your bank account to avoid such charges in the future.

question: My bank is not available on payments gateway
answer: We apologize for the inconvenience.We kindly request you to proceed with your payment using one of the banks currently available on our payment gateway.

question: I am not receiving OTP
answer: Kindly check your SMS Spam/Junk folder and check mobile network connectivity. OTP is sent on registered mobile number and email.

question: I have paid my emi but it is not reflecting in my loan statement
answer: After making an EPI (EQUATED PERIODIC INSTALMENT (EPI)) payment, please allow up to 24 hours for the details to be updated in your Statement of Account. We kindly ask you to check your SOA after this time period. It's important to note that if you are making a payment within 5 days of your EPI (EQUATED PERIODIC INSTALMENT (EPI)) due date, the amount will be adjusted in the following month's EPI (EQUATED PERIODIC INSTALMENT (EPI)), not in the current month. We advise you to make advance EPI (EQUATED PERIODIC INSTALMENT (EPI)) payments at least 5 days prior to your EPI (EQUATED PERIODIC INSTALMENT (EPI)) due date in order to see an impact on the current month's EPI (EQUATED PERIODIC INSTALMENT (EPI)). Please ensure your account is sufficiently funded for the upcoming EPI (EQUATED PERIODIC INSTALMENT (EPI)). Note: Gold Loan users can pay the EMI amount anytime; EIP period(Equated Instalment Plan) condition doesn’t apply. If an early payment is made, the EMI due date will be updated and will reflect in the Statement of Account (SOA) once the payment is processed. CTA label: Document center, Android CTA Link: bajajsuperapp://documenation/documentcenter , IOS CTA Link: bajajsuperapp://documenation/documentcenter , Web CTA : https://bajajfinserv.in/myaccountlogin?Source=Document
